plugin_desc: Omnitron Systems Technology iConverter management-module SNMP child template for industrial Ethernet media converters and fiber transceiver modules under Omnitron enterprise PEN 7342. The shared Switch SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The private OMNITRON-MIB / OMNITRON-POE-MIB / OMNITRON-TC-MIB (omnitron OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { enterprises 7342 } + icAgent(1)/prodAgent(2)/omnitronProducts(5) + managementModule(1)/omnitronMIB(3)) expose iConverter management module inventory and PoE port budget leaves, but the publicly documented OMNITRON-MIB / OMNITRON-POE-MIB / OMNITRON-TC-MIB do not publish a stable, row-free chassis-level scalar health object that bk-lite can promote to a single device_* metric; the OMNITRON-POE-MIB and icAgent/managementModule subtrees are per-port or per-module rows, which telegraf inputs.snmp cannot aggregate into one bk-lite scalar, so they are kept as N/A to honor the no-fabricated-health-metrics rule.
name: Switch
